name_en: In stock 24P Pearl Square Bag is something special, sisters. You might dodge autumn and winter, but you can't dodge spring and summer. This square bag is too beautiful. Who can refuse pearls? + Little Cute Square. Especially suitable for relatively slim girls, because it's not as thick as the square bag, it's thinner on the side. Whether you carry it or hold it, it's very small and exquisite but can still hold some things... Also, the sheepskin has been treated, so it's not as fragile as the sheepskin on the previous Golden Ball Square Bag. Everything is good except the price! I love it so much, sisters. Hope all sisters can buy the bags they like. Don't worry about what others think. 20cm 99337
